sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ حُسْنُ الْخُلُقِ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي حَيَاةِ الْمُسْلِمِ.
sentences.translation: Lijepo ponašanje se smatra osnovnim stubom u životu muslimana.
sentences.translationEn: Good character is considered a fundamental pillar in a Muslim's life.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ مِنْ خِيَارِكُمْ أَحْسَنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقًا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْمَنَاقِبِ، 3559].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Najbolji među vama su oni koji imaju najljepše ponašanje.' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o vrlinama, 3559].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'The best among you are those who have the best manners.' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Virtues, 3559].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الصَّادِقُ يَتَعَامَلُ مَعَ النَّاسِ بِرِفْقٍ وَلِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Iskren musliman se prema ljudima odnosi blago i nježno.
sentences.translationEn: A sincere Muslim treats people with kindness and gentleness.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ يَقُودُ إِلَى الْمَحَبَّةِ وَالسَّلَامِ بَيْنَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovakav karakter vodi ka ljubavi i miru u društvu.
sentences.translationEn: This character leads to love and peace within the community.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَقْتَدِي بِالرَّسُولِ فِي جَمِيعِ أَقْوَالِهِ وَأَفْعَالِهِ الْجَمِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mi se ugledamo na Poslanika u svim njegovim lijepim riječima i postupcima.
sentences.translationEn: We follow the Prophet's example in all his beautiful words and actions.
